nav_save_description: Supports Twitter/X, YouTube, XHS, WeChat, and more
index_url_hint: Supported: Twitter/X, YouTube, XiaoHongShu, WeChat articles
index_feature_5: Full-text search across all saved content
help_backend_default: The script defaults to http://localhost:6201. To change it:
help_backend_step1: Click the Tampermonkey icon → find the script
help_backend_step3: Enter your address (e.g. http://192.168.1.x:6201) and refresh the page
help_toast_red: Failed — check the service is running or cookies are valid
help_twitter_where: Right end of every tweet's action bar
help_youtube_where1: Video page — next to Like/Share buttons
help_youtube_where2: Homepage feed — top-left of each thumbnail (hover)
help_youtube_where3: 3-dot menu on any card — "保存视频" item
help_xhs_where1: Note detail page — circular button bottom-right
help_wechat_where: Inline icon after "原创" badge in the article header
help_faq1_a1: Confirm Tampermonkey is enabled and the script shows v3.8
help_faq1_a2: Refresh the page and wait 1–2 seconds
help_faq1_a3: Check the browser console (F12) for [XHS-SAVER] / [WECHAT-SAVER] logs
help_faq1_a4: For XHS note detail button, open a specific note (URL must contain /explore/<id>)
help_faq2_a1: Make sure the service is running
help_faq2_a2: Update the backend URL via ⚙️ 设置后端地址
help_faq2_a3: Confirm @connect * is granted in Tampermonkey settings
help_faq3_a: Go to Platforms tab → XHS Cookie Refresh. Export cookies from Cookie-Editor while logged in to xiaohongshu.com, paste the JSON, and save.
help_faq4_q: XHS note URL must include xsec_token
help_faq4_a: The save button captures the full URL including ?xsec_token=..., which is required by the XHS API. Make sure you open the note directly (not from a shared short link) so the token is present in the URL bar.
telegram_step1: Create a bot via @BotFather and copy the token
telegram_step2: Paste the token above and click Save & Start Bot
telegram_step3: Open your bot in Telegram and send /start — you become the owner
telegram_step4: Send or forward any tweet link to the bot to save it
settings_facebook_cookie_desc: Login to facebook.com, install Cookie-Editor extension, export all cookies as JSON, and paste here. Requires xs and c_user cookies.
settings_api_key_desc: Used by external tools (Tampermonkey, mobile app, etc.) to call POST /api/submit. Once set, all external requests must include this key. Without it, the endpoint is unprotected.
settings_no_key_warning: No authentication — anyone can access the submit endpoint
settings_qr_desc: Scan with the OmniSaver mobile app to auto-configure server URL and API key.
settings_qr_unavailable: QR code is only shown when a key is generated. Click "Regenerate" to get a new QR code.
settings_qr_footer: QR contains: server URL + API Key
settings_mobile_coming: OmniSaver mobile app is in development. It will support:
settings_mobile_feature_1: Share any content from any app to OmniSaver with one tap
settings_mobile_feature_2: Scan QR code to auto-configure server
settings_save_path_desc: Base directory where all downloaded content is stored
settings_language_desc: Choose the display language for the web interface.
settings_date_folders_desc: Organise saved content into YYYY-MM-DD subfolders
settings_playwright_headless_desc: Run browser in background (no visible window)
settings_youtube_api_key_desc: Used to fetch channel avatars for saved YouTube videos. Get a free key at console.cloud.google.com → Enable "YouTube Data API v3" → Credentials → API Key.
settings_twitter_cookie_desc: Enables logged-in scraping via xreach — access more content and avoid login walls. Export cookies from Cookie-Editor (Chrome extension) as JSON while logged in to x.com. Use a secondary account to reduce risk.
settings_xhs_cookie_desc: When XHS saves start failing, refresh your cookies here. Export cookies from Cookie-Editor (Chrome extension) as JSON while logged in to xiaohongshu.com.
settings_reddit_cookie_desc: Same as XiaoHongShu — save Cookie-Editor JSON directly to the Agent Reach directory. Export all cookies from reddit.com while logged in.
settings_zhihu_cookie_desc: Required to bypass login walls and anti-bot for Zhihu answers and articles. Export all cookies from Cookie-Editor while logged in to zhihu.com, then paste the JSON here.
settings_regenerate_confirm: Regenerate will immediately invalidate the old key. All clients using it will need to update. Confirm?
settings_key_generated: Key generated — please copy and save it
settings_revoke_confirm: After revoking, the endpoint will have no authentication. Confirm?
settings_key_revoked: Key revoked — endpoint is now unprotected
settings_key_hidden_alert: Full key is only shown once when generated. Regenerate to view.
settings_key_copy_alert: Full key can only be copied when generated. Regenerate to copy.
